info.name: Modfanart API v1
info.description: Backend v1 (Express.js, port 5000). Auth via Firebase — get an ID token from Firebase SDK on the client, paste into the {{firebase_token}} collection variable. All protected routes inherit bearer auth automatically.

request.description: Call after every Firebase sign-in. Finds or creates the user record in our DB. Returns user profile with role + brands. Pass Firebase ID token as Bearer.

item.name: Get category by ID or slug

body.raw:
{

  "prize_pool": 1000
}
